column4: Note
Example: 那个……我刚刚要说什么来着？ / Uh… what was I about to say?
Example: 他这个人嘛，怎么说呢，挺有意思的。 / This guy, how should I put it… he’s quite interesting.

column3: what I mean is / that is to say
column4: Example: 就是说，你不同意这个方案？ / So what you mean is, you don’t agree with this plan?
Example: 我想想，上次见他好像是去年的事了。 / Let me think, last time I saw him was last year.
Example: 等一下，你刚才说的那个地方叫什么？ / Hold on, what was that place you mentioned?
Example: 我们先吃饭，然后去看电影。 / We’ll eat first, and then go watch a movie.
Example: 我觉得你说的有道理。 / I think what you said makes sense.
Example: 我感觉这样做不太合适。 / I feel like doing it this way is not very suitable.
Example: 说实话，我一开始觉得我学不会中文。 / To be honest, at first I thought I couldn’t learn Chinese.
Example: 其实我以前也不喜欢吃辣的。 / Actually, I didn’t use to like spicy food.
Example: 坦白说，我对这个结果不太满意。 / Frankly speaking, I’m not very satisfied with this result.
Example: 要我说，这个办法更好。 / If you ask me, this method is better.
Example: 我看这件事没那么简单。 / I’d say this matter isn’t that simple.
Example: 真的吗？太好了！ / Really? That’s great!
Example: 不会吧！你真的做到了？ / No way! You actually did it?

column3: I see / so that’s how it is
column4: Example: 原来如此，我明白了。 / So that’s how it is — I understand now.
Example: 没想到他会来！ / I didn’t expect him to come!
Example: 这个想法很有意思。 / This idea is interesting.
Example: 你到了那里，然后呢？ / You got there, and then what?
Example: 确实，这个问题比我想的更复杂。 / Indeed, this problem is more complicated than I thought.
Example: 这样啊，那我明白了。 / Oh, I see — I understand now.
Example: 难怪他昨天那么累。 / No wonder he was so tired yesterday.
Example: 这家店东西好吃，而且很便宜。 / This place has good food, and it’s also cheap.
Example: 另外，我还想问你一件事。 / Also, I’d like to ask you something else.
Example: 我需要买水果，还有牛奶。 / I need to buy fruit, and also milk.
Example: 这个方法不但简单，而且效果很好。 / This method is not only simple, but also effective.
Example: 他太忙了，甚至没时间吃饭。 / He’s so busy he doesn’t even have time to eat.
Example: 人不够，再加上天气不好，计划取消了。 / There weren’t enough people, and on top of that the weather was bad, so the plan was cancelled.
Example: 我喜欢水果，特别是苹果。 / I like fruit, especially apples.
Example: 这道菜不错，不过有点咸。 / This dish is good, but a bit salty.
Example: 虽然很累，但是我觉得值得。 / Although I’m tired, I think it was worth it.
Example: 我没复习，考试反而考得更好。 / I didn’t review, but actually did better on the exam.
Example: 一方面我想出国，另一方面我不想离开家人。 / On one hand I want to go abroad; on the other, I don’t want to leave my family.
Example: 我以为他会生气，相反，他很平静。 / I thought he would be angry; on the contrary, he was calm.
Example: 不管怎样，我都会去。 / No matter what, I will go.
Example: 因为他每天练习，所以进步很快。 / Because he practices every day, he improves quickly.
Example: 这就是为什么我觉得学汉字很重要。 / This is why I think learning characters is important.
Example: 反正已经迟到了，别着急了。 / We’re already late anyway, so don’t stress.
Example: 既然已经决定了，就不要后悔。 / Since you’ve already decided, don’t regret it.
Example: 他没准备，结果失败了。 / He didn’t prepare, and as a result he failed.
Example: 换句话说，这个问题其实没那么复杂。 / In other words, this problem actually isn’t that complicated.
Example: 我的意思是，还有更好的选择。 / What I mean is, there are better options.
Example: 简单来说，你需要多练习。 / Simply put, you need to practice more.
Example: 所以说，我们应该早点准备。 / So what I’m saying is, we should prepare earlier.
Example: 你得快点，要不然我们会迟到。 / You need to hurry, otherwise we’ll be late.
Example: 对了，我差点忘了告诉你一件事。 / Oh right, I almost forgot to tell you something.
Example: 说到这个，我想起来一件事。 / Speaking of this, I remembered something.
Example: 事情很复杂，总之最后解决了。 / It was complicated, but in short, it was resolved.
Example: 顺便说一下，明天我不在。 / By the way, I won’t be here tomorrow.
Example: 别说这个了，换个话题吧。 / Let’s not talk about this; let’s change the subject.
Example: 我同意你的看法。 / I agree with your opinion.
Example: 没错，问题就在这里。 / Exactly, that’s where the problem is.
Example: 对对对，我也是这么想的。 / Right, right, right, I also think so.
Example: 外面太冷了。也是，那我们就待在家吧。 / It’s too cold outside. True, then let’s stay home.
Example: 你说得对，我从来没想过这个角度。 / You’re right, I never thought about it from this angle.
Example: 我不是说你做得不好，只是觉得可以更好。 / I’m not saying you did badly, I just think it could be better.
Example: 话是这么说，但是做起来没那么容易。 / That may be true, but it’s not that easy to do.
Example: 也许我是错的，但是我觉得我们走错方向了。 / I may be wrong, but I think we’re going the wrong way.
Example: 学得久不一定学得好。 / Studying for a long time doesn’t necessarily mean studying well.

column3: not quite / you can’t really say that
column4: Example: 中文太难了！也不能这么说，关键是看你怎么学。 / Chinese is too hard! Not quite — the key is how you study.
Example: 最重要的是每天都练习。 / The most important thing is to practice every day.
Example: 关键是你有没有用对方法。 / The key is whether you’re using the right method.
Example: 毕竟他只学了半年，已经很不错了。 / After all, he has only studied for half a year, so it’s already pretty good.
Example: 更重要的是，大家都同意。 / More importantly, everyone agrees.
Example: 我经常在油管上看中文视频。 / I often watch Chinese videos on YouTube.
Example: 幸会幸会，很高兴认识你。 / Pleasure to meet you, nice to make your acquaintance. Slightly formal/polite.
Example: 鸡蛋和肉都有很多蛋白质。 / Eggs and meat have a lot of protein.
Example: 米饭和面条都是碳水。 / Rice and noodles are both carbs. Casual short form of 碳水化合物.
Example: 最后我想强调的是，方法比努力更重要。 / Finally, what I want to emphasize is that method matters more than effort.
Example: 好的，那就这样吧，回头再联系。 / Alright, let’s leave it at that and talk later.
Example: 好，先这样，我们明天再聊。 / Okay, that’s all for now; let’s talk tomorrow.

column3: let’s talk later / we’ll discuss it later
column4: Example: 这件事先不急，回头再说。 / This isn’t urgent; let’s talk about it later.
Example: 好了，我先走了，下次再见！ / Alright, I’ll get going. See you next time!
Example: 今天聊得很开心，改天再聊！ / It was great chatting today; let’s talk another day!
Example: 你中文说得真好！过奖了，我还在学习。 / Your Chinese is really good! You flatter me, I’m still learning.
Example: 一般来说，我晚上比较有空。 / Generally speaking, I’m more free in the evening.
Example: 这个视频是在抖音上火起来的。 / This video became popular on Douyin.
Example: 我想听一些中国民歌。 / I want to listen to some Chinese folk songs.
Example: 四川是中国的一个省份。 / Sichuan is a province in China.
Example: 你的母语是什么？ / What is your native language?
Example: 你平时看网飞吗？ / Do you usually watch Netflix?
Example: 这首歌的歌词很美。 / The lyrics of this song are beautiful.

column3: motivational / inspirational content, often cliché or cheesy
column4: Example: 这句话有点像心灵鸡汤。 / This sentence is kind of like motivational cliché content.
Example: 我现在在读本科。 / I’m currently studying for a bachelor’s degree.

column3: to get rich / make a fortune
column4: Example: 祝你新年发财！ / Wishing you prosperity in the new year!
Example: 他是一个很有抱负的人。 / He is a very ambitious person.
Example: 你圣诞节有什么计划？ / What plans do you have for Christmas?
Example: 小孩子相信圣诞老人。 / Children believe in Santa Claus.
Example: 学语言需要慢慢积累知识。 / Learning a language requires slowly accumulating knowledge.
Example: 唐朝是中国历史上很有名的朝代。 / The Tang was a famous dynasty in Chinese history.
Example: 我已经下载了这个软件。 / I already downloaded this software.
Example: 你的座右铭是什么？ / What is your motto?
Example: 我的目标是每天学习中文。 / My goal is to study Chinese every day.
Example: 我这样说有道理吗？ / Does what I’m saying make sense?
Example: 在芬兰有时候可以看到极光。 / In Finland, sometimes you can see the aurora.
Example: 我想学习一些中国诗词。 / I want to study some Chinese poetry.
Example: 这个词是俚语吗？ / Is this word slang?
Example: 这是本地人常去的餐厅。 / This is a restaurant local people often go to.
Example: 他是土生土长的北京人。 / He was born and raised in Beijing.
Example: 我很佩服你的坚持。 / I really admire your persistence.
Example: 他们说他们是一见钟情。 / They say it was love at first sight.

column3: to roll the tongue / rolled R sound
column4: Example: 我不会弹舌。 / I can’t roll my tongue.
Example: 她很喜欢八卦明星的事情。 / She really likes gossiping about celebrities.

Example: 运动前要先热身。 / You should warm up before exercising.

Example: 中国有很多少数民族。 / China has many ethnic minorities.
Example: 他今晚要直播打游戏。 / He is going to livestream playing games tonight.
Example: 这是一首经典老歌。 / This is a classic old song.

Example: 这个地方有特别的风土人情。 / This place has unique local customs and traditions.
Example: 你不能来？可惜啦！ / You can’t come? That’s a pity!

Example: 北京话里有很多儿化音。 / Beijing speech has a lot of erhua sounds.
Example: 你会继续学中文吗？那必须的！ / Will you keep learning Chinese? Of course!
Example: 我是这个乐队的铁粉。 / I’m a hardcore fan of this band.

column3: to like / give a thumbs up online

Example: 语言不是最大的障碍。 / Language is not the biggest barrier.

Example: 这个词是贬义词，最好别乱用。 / This word is derogatory, so it’s best not to use it carelessly.

Example: 我昨晚做了一个噩梦。 / I had a nightmare last night.
Example: 文言文对我来说很难。 / Classical Chinese is very difficult for me.

column3: pale, youthful, and thin beauty standard
column4: Example: “白幼瘦”是一种有争议的审美标准。 / “Pale, young, and thin” is a controversial beauty standard.

Example: 这句话抓住了问题的精髓。 / This sentence captures the essence of the problem.
Example: 这个语法点有点复杂。 / This grammar point is a bit complicated.
Example: 好不好用？看个人吧。 / Is it easy to use? It depends on the person.

column3: to become popular / blow up online
column4: Example: 这个梗最近火起来了。 / This meme has become popular recently.

column2: hái xíng ba, hái xíng ba
column4: Example: 这家店怎么样？还行吧，还行吧。 / How is this restaurant? It’s okay, just so-so.

Example: 这是一个不可思议的故事。 / This is an unbelievable story.
Example: 我觉得我们的三观不太一样。 / I feel like our core values are not quite the same.
Example: 这个事情有点复杂，你懂的。 / This thing is a bit complicated, you know what I mean.
